Container.Name: gym-app
Container.Overview: Family Gym App — Track workouts, exercises, body weight and progress. Supports multiple users, 1300+ exercises with GIFs, custom exercises, workout scheduling, analytics and Excel export.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Port to access the web interface (e.g. http://your-ip:3001)

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Where the database and uploaded images are stored. Back this up regularly!

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for the default admin account on first run. Change this! Only applies when creating a fresh database.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Your timezone for correct date/time display. E.g. Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh, America/New_York, Europe/London

Config.Name: Server Port (internal)
Config.Description: Internal server port. Keep this matching the Web Port above.
